comment_text.sn19.5:1.4: He is stabbed like he used to stab his pigs.

root_text.sn19.5:1.1: “Idhāhaṁ, āvuso, gijjhakūṭā pabbatā orohanto addasaṁ asilomaṁ purisaṁ vehāsaṁ gacchantaṁ.
root_text.sn19.5:1.2: Tassa te asī uppatitvā uppatitvā tasseva kāye nipatanti.
root_text.sn19.5:1.4: eso, bhikkhave, satto imasmiṁyeva rājagahe sūkariko ahosi …pe….

translation_text.sn19.5:1.1: “Just now, reverend, as I was descending from Vulture’s Peak Mountain I saw a man whose body hairs were swords flying through the air.
translation_text.sn19.5:1.2: And those swords kept rising up and falling on his body
translation_text.sn19.5:1.4: “That being used to be a pig butcher right here in Rājagaha. …”
